issues.claim: Analog does not equally apply elsewhere
issues.objection: Force-fit test for 7.24: the analog (thread 3 (the unintelligent mistake the manifest for the whole; STRETCHED metaphysics)) is anchored to the verse's specific structural claim; it would not apply to a randomly chosen alternate verse. The verse's central image — for 7.24, the image specifically tied to thread 3 (the unintelligent mistake the manifest for the whole; STRETCHED metaphysics) — is what the engineering scenario depends on; substituting another verse's image breaks the analog. The STRETCHED tag is honest for this verse: Verse claims metaphysical concealment (avyaktaṁ vyaktim āpannaṁ mistaken). Engineering analog scoped narrowly: architecture diagrams are partial; the substrate carried by the senior is not directly diagrammable. Counter-example: stale tacit assumption is not the verse's paraṁ bhāvam.

notes: Force-fit test for 7.24: the engineering analog cannot equally well derive from a different verse. Tags (full-system-view, operator-system-coupling, system-recognition) are anchored on this verse's specific claim. PASS.
